content.en:
Far away.

Aurora and the other sons of the era all looked at the center of the explosion with pale faces, and the terrifying impact force caused countless fragments of the rules everywhere to be broken, and the aura of annihilation seemed to be able to tear apart a dominant extreme powerhouse.

Even they didn't dare to enter that area again at this time.

"I'm afraid the Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws is dead!"

Aurora sighed.

Although he and Ye Tian are not friends, and can even be said to be enemies, it is really a pity that a genius who is even more demonic than him died in such a situation.

"Why did the Lord of Ten Thousand Laws want to die with the Heavenly Venerable-level Destroying Creature, it is not a problem to escape with his strength, there is no need to save us!"

Huohe frowned and wondered.

"Could it be, the Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord is not dead, right? He can block the attack of the Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature, and an explosion of this magnitude may not be able to kill him!" someone said again.

"Hahaha, guys, I'm not dead!"

A laugh came from far away.

In the next moment, Ye Tian's figure appeared in front of them, not to mention that he was not injured, and he was not even embarrassed at all.

"Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, it's great that you're okay!"

The Son of the Many Eras.

However, some of the sons of the era had a pity in their hearts, they were more hopeful that they would fall in the explosion, even if Ye Tian saved their lives, they didn't want Ye Tian to live.

After all, Ye Tian was too demonic, completely suppressing their light.

If Ye Tian never died, they would live in Ye Tian's shadow forever.

At this time, Aurora was a little confused.

Ye Tian's direction is obviously not the explosion area, but the other side, and in the situation just now, space shuttle seems to be impossible to do, unless Ye Tian has reached an incredible level in space, he can't use space shuttle to leave!

What Aurora didn't know was that Ye Tian didn't just use space shuttle, but used the talent of substitution for death.

Although the substitute death talent is not a very high-level talent, it is just a top-level talent, but this talent is indeed enough to defy the sky.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't know the reason for the substitution talent, but now he knew.

The substitution of death talent involves the power of space, soul and other avenues, and the strong above the dominant level can cut off the effect of the substitution of death talent.

It stands to reason that Ye Tian could not use the death substitution talent to leave in the body of the Tianzun-level destruction creature, but he used his understanding of the space avenue and soul plus the death substitution talent to forcibly replace the death successfully, so that the body and the death substitute clone switched bodies.

Of course, this process can also be interrupted, but the Tianzun-level destruction creature is too stupid to interrupt Ye Tian at all, otherwise Ye Tian, he estimates that he will really suffer the incineration and explosion of the Nine Heavens Hellfire head-on.

In that case, if he didn't die, he would definitely be seriously injured and dying.

Fortunately, everything went according to his plan, and he was very glad that he had developed a habit of throwing away the death clone casually, otherwise he really wouldn't be able to kill that Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature.

Suddenly.

One of the sons of the Epoch shouted, "What is that......"

As he shouted, everyone's eyes were fixed on the center of the explosion, and in the shattered void, there was a passage that led to the unknown.

"It's a spatial passage, and it seems to be extraordinary!"

Aurora's expression moved, and he flew over.

At this time, the shockwave had completely dissipated, and the aura of destruction had also dissipated most of it, and it was basically impossible to kill them.

Ye Tian didn't hesitate at all, and rushed over in an instant.

He was also curious, where did the space passage caused by the explosion connect, and whether it would also be a big opportunity?

Soon, everyone stood in front of the spatial passage, staring at the spatial passage one by one.

Judging from the fluctuations of the spatial passage, the road to the world is definitely not an ordinary world, and the spatial tunnel is very long, which should be connected to the deep dimensional world.

Aurora and the others looked at the space passage and pondered one by one.

No one knows where this passage is connected or if there are any dangers.

As a result, no one immediately went in.

"There shouldn't be any danger, I'll go in first!"

A Child of the Epoch rushed into the spatial passage.

Subsequently, the other sons of the era also entered one by one, they were all the sons of the era who had gone through countless difficulties, and they had even experienced many dangers, so they were naturally not timid and afraid.

Moreover, their strength is not weak, and they will not be so easy to encounter danger.

The aurora also flew into the space channel, and in the end, only Ye Tian remained.

"Maybe it's chance, my current strength is in a bottleneck, maybe this time it's a big opportunity, I have to go in!"

Ye Tian thought so, and also entered the space tunnel.

Wow!

After a burst of teleportation, he stood in a strange land.

And at this time, not far away stood those children of the era, they were also here, obviously this time they came in not a random teleportation.

Suddenly.

The expressions of several sons of the era changed greatly: "It's not good, that spatial passage is shrinking!"

Once the spatial passage is shrunk and gone, they will not be able to exit through this exit.

But if they leave immediately, they are reluctant.

When I was entangled, the spatial passage disappeared completely, and now it is useless to regret it.

And soon, they couldn't make this place special.

"The divine power can't be used, and the rule suppression is very strong, the rules of this heaven and earth are very strong, but unfortunately it is also very difficult to trigger the rules of this heaven and earth. Moreover, here, even the soul power is suppressed, and it seems that only the physical body is not affected!"

Aurora Path.

"What kind of place is this, it is obviously a place covered by the origin rules of the universe, and the rules are so powerful, how can it suppress us so much, is it because of our identity?"

One of the Sons of the Era frowned.

"It's not because of your identity, whoever should enter here will be suppressed, because I'm also suppressed!"

Ye Tian said.

After being silent for a while, Aurora suddenly said in surprise: "Could this be the Origin Realm?"

"What, the Origin Realm, the legendary Origin Realm, the Origin Realm that even the Supremes can't find?"

The Children of the Other Ages were shocked.

"What is the Origin Realm?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

Aurora was not at all surprised by Ye Tian's problem, after all, the Origin Realm was a secret, and only the powerful Cosmic Era knew about it, and this Cosmic Era had only recently developed, so it was naturally unclear about the existence of the Origin Realm.

Aurora did not hide it, explaining: "The existence of the Origin Realm was told to us by the Supremes, it is a dimensional world very close to the origin of the universe, and the rules are special, and it has great suppression of living beings in the outside world. There may not be a lot of resources in the Origin Realm, but there is a treasure in the Origin Realm that even the Supreme Beings are crazy about—the Well of Origin!"

"The Well of Origin!"

Ye Tian seemed to have guessed what this was.

If that's the case, it's a great treasure!
